- Central (Discharge) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident received central IV access in the last three days of their SNF stay. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
1024 TRTMT_NONE_ADMSN_CD TRTMT_NONE_ADMSN_CD O0110Z1A Other: None of the above (Admission) CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that the resident did not receive any of the listed treatments days one through three (on admission) of becoming a resident of the facility. 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
